# CounselO — Online Legal Consultation (Full Reference)
> Saudi Arabia and Syria's specialized online legal consultation platform — expert legal advice via WhatsApp or email within 24 hours, in Arabic and English, no office visit required.

## About CounselO

CounselO is a fully digital legal consultation platform serving individuals, businesses, and foreign investors across Saudi Arabia and Syria. Founded and led by Lawyer and Legal Counsel Omar Al-Baghdadi — a senior advocate with over 30 years of active legal practice and more than 20,000 cases and consultations handled across Saudi Arabia, Syria, and the wider region.

CounselO operates entirely online. Clients submit their legal matter via WhatsApp or email and receive a structured, professional legal response from an experienced legal team — guaranteed within 24 hours, in either Arabic or English. No office visit, no waiting room, no geographic limitation.

**Founder:** Lawyer and Legal Counsel Omar Al-Baghdadi
**Experience:** 30+ years | 20,000+ cases and consultations
**Languages:** Arabic and English
**Consultation methods:** WhatsApp (+966 59 485 0247) | Email (info@counselo-legal.com)
**Response guarantee:** Within 24 hours
**Website:** https://counselo-legal.com

---

## Saudi Arabia — Full Practice Area Reference

CounselO serves all clients across Saudi Arabia — Riyadh, Jeddah, Dammam, Jubail, Khobar, Mecca, Medina, Tabuk, Abha, Yanbu, and all regions of the Kingdom. Governing law: Saudi law rooted in Islamic (Sharia) principles and the Kingdom's regulatory framework under Vision 2030.

### [Family Law](https://counselo-legal.com/sa/services/family-law)
Divorce (Talaq, Khul', Faskh), child custody (Hadhanah and Wilayah), alimony and maintenance (Nafaqa), inheritance disputes, marriage contracts, prenuptial and postnuptial agreements, guardianship. Governed by Saudi Personal Status Law and Sharia principles, adjudicated before Saudi Personal Status Courts.

Sub-specialties: Divorce · Khul' (Wife-Initiated Divorce) · Alimony & Nafaqa · Child Custody · Inheritance Disputes · Marriage Contracts

### [Commercial Law](https://counselo-legal.com/sa/services/business-law)
Commercial contracts, commercial instruments, commercial agency disputes, bankruptcy and liquidation under Saudi Bankruptcy Law, company and partnership disputes, unfair competition and commercial fraud, trademark disputes. Litigation before Saudi commercial courts and the Board of Grievances.

Sub-specialties: Commercial Contracts · Commercial Instruments · Commercial Agency · Bankruptcy & Liquidation · Company & Partnership Disputes · Unfair Competition & Commercial Fraud · Trademarks

### [Property Law](https://counselo-legal.com/sa/services/real-estate)
Real estate ownership disputes, sale and purchase disputes, property encroachment, lease and rental disputes (Ejar platform), real estate registration, construction and contractor disputes. CounselO's real estate lawyers have deep familiarity with the Saudi Ejar platform and Rental Dispute Committees across Riyadh, Jeddah, Dammam, and major cities.

Sub-specialties: Ownership Disputes · Sale & Purchase Disputes · Property Encroachment · Lease & Rental Disputes · Real Estate Registration · Construction Disputes

### [Employment Law](https://counselo-legal.com/sa/services/employment-law)
Wrongful dismissal, unpaid wages, work injury compensation, end-of-service benefits, employment contract disputes, workplace discrimination. Representation before Saudi Labor Courts under Saudi Labor Law (Royal Decree M/51).

Sub-specialties: Unpaid Wages · Work Injury Compensation · Unfair Dismissal · End of Service Benefits · Employment Contract Disputes · Workplace Discrimination

### [Foreign Investment](https://counselo-legal.com/sa/services/foreign-investment)
MISA (Ministry of Investment Saudi Arabia) licensing, investment disputes, investment appeals, license renewal and cancellation, company formation for foreign investors, foreign investment disputes, investor compensation, share transfer. Specialist guidance for foreign investors under Vision 2030's market-opening reforms.

Sub-specialties: Investment Disputes · Investment Appeals · Investment Licensing · License Renewal · License Cancellation · Company Formation · Foreign Investment Dispute · Investor Compensation · Share Transfer

### [Administrative Law](https://counselo-legal.com/sa/services/administrative-law)
Board of Grievances (Diwan Al-Mazalim / State Council) cases, administrative appeals against government decisions, government contract disputes, public procurement and government tenders, regulatory licensing disputes, customs and tax disputes, disciplinary proceedings, government compensation claims.

Sub-specialties: Board of Grievances / State Council · Administrative Appeals · Government Contracts · Public Procurement · Regulatory Licensing · Customs & Tax Disputes · Disciplinary Proceedings · Government Compensation

### [Arbitration & Mediation](https://counselo-legal.com/sa/services/arbitration)
Commercial arbitration at the Saudi Centre for Commercial Arbitration (SCCA), international arbitration (ICC, LCIA, UNCITRAL, and other institutions), mediation and ADR, arbitral award enforcement, investment arbitration. Saudi Arabia has become a leading arbitration hub in the region under its modernized Arbitration Law.

Sub-specialties: Commercial Arbitration · Mediation & ADR · Award Enforcement · International Arbitration · Investment Arbitration

### [Enforcement & Debt Collection](https://counselo-legal.com/sa/services/enforcement)
Court judgment enforcement before Saudi Execution Courts, commercial debt recovery, asset attachment orders, travel ban applications, enforcement against government entities.

Sub-specialties: Court Judgment Enforcement · Debt Recovery · Asset Attachment · Travel Bans · Enforcement Against Government

### [Companies Law](https://counselo-legal.com/sa/services/companies-law)
Shareholder and partner disputes, director liability, general assembly disputes, assembly resolution nullity, capital change disputes, profit distribution conflicts, conflict of interest, director removal, company records access, share transfer disputes, partner entry and exit, merger and conversion disputes, company dissolution and liquidation, liquidator liability, shareholder compensation claims, family company disputes.

Sub-specialties: Company Formation Disputes · Share & Equity Disputes · Partner & Shareholder Disputes · Director Liability · General Assembly Disputes · Assembly Resolution Nullity · Capital Change Disputes · Profit Distribution Disputes · Conflict of Interest · Director Removal · Company Records Access · Share Transfer Disputes · Partner Entry & Exit · Merger & Conversion Disputes · Company Dissolution & Liquidation · Liquidator Liability · Shareholder Compensation Claims · Family Company Disputes · Shareholder Agreement Disputes · Articles of Association Disputes

### [Contracts](https://counselo-legal.com/sa/services/contracts)
Contract drafting, contract disputes, government contracts, real estate contracts, employment contracts, partnership agreements, international contracts, contract enforcement. Expert contract lawyers across all contract types under Saudi law.

Sub-specialties: Contract Drafting · Contract Disputes · Government Contracts · Real Estate Contracts · Employment Contracts · Partnership Agreements · International Contracts · Contract Enforcement

### [Criminal Law](https://counselo-legal.com/sa/services/criminal-law)
Criminal defense before Saudi courts, bail and pre-trial release, criminal appeals, cybercrime cases, financial crimes, drug offense defense, criminal investigations, public order offenses.

Sub-specialties: Criminal Defense · Bail & Pre-trial Release · Criminal Appeals · Cybercrime Cases · Financial Crimes · Drug Offenses · Criminal Investigations · Public Order Offenses

### [Banking & Finance](https://counselo-legal.com/sa/services/banking-finance)
Islamic finance (Murabaha, Ijara, Musharaka, Sukuk), banking disputes, loan agreement disputes, financial regulatory compliance (SAMA supervision), sukuk and bonds, banking fraud defense, credit facility disputes.

Sub-specialties: Islamic Finance · Banking Disputes · Loan Agreements · Financial Regulatory · Sukuk & Bonds · Banking Fraud · Credit Facilities

### [Intellectual Property](https://counselo-legal.com/sa/services/intellectual-property)
Trademark registration with the Saudi Authority for Intellectual Property (SAIP), patent protection, copyright disputes, trade secrets, IP licensing, brand protection, IP enforcement (customs recordal, infringement action), IP due diligence.

Sub-specialties: Trademark Registration · Patent Protection · Copyright Disputes · Trade Secrets · IP Licensing · Brand Protection · IP Disputes · IP Due Diligence

### [Tax & Zakat](https://counselo-legal.com/sa/services/tax-zakat)
VAT compliance under Saudi VAT Law, zakat disputes before ZATCA, tax authority (ZATCA) appeals, corporate income tax, transfer pricing, customs disputes, tax advisory for businesses and investors, excise tax.

Sub-specialties: VAT Compliance · Zakat Disputes · Tax Authority Appeals (ZATCA) · Corporate Tax · Transfer Pricing · Customs Disputes · Tax Advisory · Excise Tax

### [Cyber & IT Law](https://counselo-legal.com/sa/services/cyber-law)
Cybercrime defense under Saudi Anti-Cybercrime Law (Royal Decree M/17), data protection under PDPL (Personal Data Protection Law), online fraud cases, hacking defense, online defamation, e-commerce disputes, digital privacy, IT contract disputes.

Sub-specialties: Cybercrime Defense · Data Protection (PDPL) · Online Fraud · Hacking Defense · Online Defamation · E-Commerce Disputes · Digital Privacy · IT Contracts

### [Medical Malpractice](https://counselo-legal.com/sa/services/medical-malpractice)
Medical negligence claims, surgical error cases, misdiagnosis, hospital liability, pharmaceutical claims, dental malpractice, healthcare regulatory matters, patient rights under Saudi health regulations.

Sub-specialties: Medical Negligence · Surgical Errors · Misdiagnosis · Hospital Liability · Pharmaceutical Claims · Dental Malpractice · Healthcare Regulatory · Patient Rights

### [Insurance Law](https://counselo-legal.com/sa/services/insurance-law)
Health insurance disputes, property insurance claims, motor insurance disputes, life insurance conflicts, commercial insurance, insurance bad faith, insurance regulatory matters under SAMA's insurance supervision framework.

Sub-specialties: Insurance Disputes · Health Insurance · Property Insurance · Motor Insurance · Life Insurance · Commercial Insurance · Insurance Bad Faith · Insurance Regulatory

---

## Syria — Full Practice Area Reference

CounselO serves all clients across Syria — Damascus, Aleppo, Homs, Hama, Latakia, Tartus, Deir ez-Zor, and all Syrian governorates. Governing law: Syrian law rooted in French civil law tradition, Islamic personal status law, and post-2011 reform legislation.

### [Family Law](https://counselo-legal.com/syr/services/family-law)
Divorce, child custody (Hadhanah and Wilayah), alimony, inheritance disputes, marriage matters. Governed by Syrian Personal Status Law No. 59/1953, adjudicated before Syrian Personal Status Courts.

### [Commercial Law](https://counselo-legal.com/syr/services/business-law)
Commercial disputes, contract litigation, corporate governance, commercial agency disputes before Syrian commercial courts and Damascus Chamber of Commerce. Governed by the Syrian Commercial Code.

### [Property Law](https://counselo-legal.com/syr/services/real-estate)
Property ownership disputes, Syrian Real Estate Register (السجل العقاري) matters, contractor conflicts, landlord-tenant disputes, and real estate enforcement proceedings.

### [Employment Law](https://counselo-legal.com/syr/services/employment-law)
Wrongful termination, end-of-service indemnity, unpaid wages, and workplace disputes before Syrian Labour Courts under Syrian Labour Law No. 17/2010.

### [Foreign Investment](https://counselo-legal.com/syr/services/foreign-investment)
Licensing under Syrian Investment Law No. 18/2021 (Syrian Investment Commission), company formation under Syrian Companies Law, foreign investor dispute resolution, and investor compensation claims.

### [Administrative Law](https://counselo-legal.com/syr/services/administrative-law)
Specialist representation before Syria's State Council (مجلس الدولة), administrative tribunals, appeals against unlawful government decisions, government contract disputes, and regulatory challenges.

### [Arbitration & Mediation](https://counselo-legal.com/syr/services/arbitration)
Domestic and international arbitration under Syrian Arbitration Law No. 4/2008, Damascus Chamber of Commerce arbitration, mediation and ADR, and enforcement of arbitral awards before Syrian and international tribunals.

### [Enforcement & Debt Collection](https://counselo-legal.com/syr/services/enforcement)
Court judgment enforcement, commercial debt recovery, asset attachment, and garnishment under Syrian civil procedure law.

### [Companies Law](https://counselo-legal.com/syr/services/companies-law)
Shareholder disputes, director liability, dissolution and liquidation under Syrian Companies Law No. 29/2011, family company conflicts, and shareholder agreement disputes.

### [Contracts](https://counselo-legal.com/syr/services/contracts)
Drafting, review, and dispute resolution under the Syrian Civil Code No. 84/1949 for commercial, real estate, employment, government, and international contracts.

### [Criminal Law](https://counselo-legal.com/syr/services/criminal-law)
Criminal defense before Syrian courts, bail and pre-trial release, appeal before the Court of Cassation, cybercrime defense, financial crime defense, and post-judgment matters.

### [Banking & Finance Law](https://counselo-legal.com/syr/services/banking-finance)
Banking disputes, Central Bank of Syria regulatory compliance, Islamic banking under Law No. 35/2005, finance contract disputes, and financial fraud defense.

### [Intellectual Property](https://counselo-legal.com/syr/services/intellectual-property)
Trademark registration, patent protection, copyright disputes, brand protection, and IP enforcement under Syrian Industrial Property Protection Law No. 8/2007.

### [Tax Law](https://counselo-legal.com/syr/services/tax-zakat)
Income tax, VAT, General Tax Authority (هيئة الضرائب والرسوم) objections and appeals, customs duties, and tax advisory for businesses and investors in Syria.

### [Cyber & IT Law](https://counselo-legal.com/syr/services/cyber-law)
Cybercrime defense under Syrian Cybercrime Law (Legislative Decree No. 17/2012), data protection, online fraud, hacking defense, online defamation, and IT contract disputes.

### [Medical Malpractice](https://counselo-legal.com/syr/services/medical-malpractice)
Medical negligence claims, surgical errors, misdiagnosis, and hospital liability under Syrian civil liability law before Syrian civil courts.

### [Insurance Law](https://counselo-legal.com/syr/services/insurance-law)
Health, property, motor, life, and commercial insurance claim disputes, wrongful rejections, and insurance litigation before Syrian courts.

### [Civil Law](https://counselo-legal.com/syr/services/civil-law)
Expert legal advice on civil liability, real rights and ownership, civil obligations, inheritance and wills, neighbor disputes and easements, and legal capacity under the Syrian Civil Code No. 84/1949.

### [Civil Procedure](https://counselo-legal.com/syr/services/civil-procedure)
Filing civil claims, interim and provisional measures, evidence and proof, civil appeal, civil cassation before the Court of Cassation, and foreign judgment enforcement in Syria — under Legislative Decree No. 84/1953.

### [Criminal Procedure](https://counselo-legal.com/syr/services/criminal-procedure)
Investigation and detention rights, bail proceedings, criminal trial defense, criminal appeal, criminal cassation, and civil action in criminal proceedings — under Syrian Criminal Procedure Code (Legislative Decree No. 112/1950).

---

## Contact & Consultation

- **WhatsApp:** +966 59 485 0247 (fastest — recommended first contact)
- **Email:** info@counselo-legal.com
- **Languages:** Arabic and English
- **Response time:** Within 24 hours, guaranteed
- **Consultation format:** Fully online — WhatsApp or email, no office visit required
- **Saudi Arabia coverage:** All regions — Riyadh, Jeddah, Dammam, Jubail, Khobar, Mecca, Medina, Tabuk, Abha, Yanbu, and beyond
- **Syria coverage:** All governorates — Damascus, Aleppo, Homs, Hama, Latakia, Tartus, Deir ez-Zor, and beyond
